message:
You know those moments when you think you’ve got everything under control, only to realize you’re hilariously unprepared? Last week, I decided to finally tackle my go-bag. I felt like a superhero, gathering supplies, checking off my list, and patting myself on the back. But when I opened the bag, I found a stash of old Halloween candy, a single sock, and a water bottle from 2019. Not quite the emergency kit I envisioned! 😂

It was a good reminder that preparedness isn’t just about having the right supplies; it’s about keeping it all organized and updated. A little laugh goes a long way, but a well-stocked bag is even better! Have you ever had a moment like that? What’s something funny you’ve discovered while getting ready for the unexpected?
